_contract: CI eval gate baseline contract (D-CI-1). threshold = baseline - tolerance; a run fails a metric when measured < threshold. hard = deterministic, blocks merge at tolerance 0; soft = LLM-judge score, median-of-N + tolerance band absorbs judge noise (D-CI-2/D-CI-3). Update process: a legitimate improvement raises the floor in the SAME PR that produces it, justified in the PR body + a DECISIONS_4.md entry.
_status: PLACEHOLDER baselines carried from the recorded P3/P4 scores.
